sourceAuthority.rule: The latest merged commit on main is the sole authoritative source for code, project state, planning, and implementation history.

legacyArchiveAuthority.note: Drive files, ZIP archives, local folders, previous chat artifacts, and generated packages are non-authoritative references or outputs.

checksPerformed: Configured the Ask LUMA text field with the keyboard IME Send action
Routed both the send icon and IME Send through one guarded submission helper
Kept blank, too-short, and in-flight requests blocked
Added focused unit tests for rejected and accepted shared submission paths
Ran static IME and shared-path checks
unverified: Focused unit tests and the debug build could not run because Gradle 8.9 was not cached and services.gradle.org was unreachable
IME Send behavior was not exercised on an Android device or emulator in that environment
